name: anticipating-shadow-points
description: Self-host marketplace for the anticipating-shadow-points plugin (ASP). One-step install: /plugin marketplace add ulissesflores/anticipating-shadow-points && /plugin install anticipating-shadow-points@anticipating-shadow-points

plugins.name: anticipating-shadow-points
plugins.description: Pre-mortem-first planning protocol for LLM coding agents — Klein pre-mortem + Berkeley MAST 14-mode + claude -p /goal subprocess execution kernel + 12 Iron Laws (incl. NEVER trust $? from claude -p, parse JSON). Empirically validated on a pre-registered N=50 protocol (60% silent-refusal rate; companion whitepaper).
